behavior_in_task_description.reason: File paths (trajectories.py, orchestrator.py, test_trajectories.py), function names (interleave_rollout, branch_rollout, make_train_example), field names (error, completion_mask, is_truncated), and import constraints (get_is_truncated from prime_rl.utils.vf) are all explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes WHAT the bugs are (empty trajectory crash, error not zeroing mask, etc.) and expected behavior, without giving literal code replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_trajectories_return_type_annotation asserts the exact string 'def interleave_rollout(state: vf.State) -> list[TrainingSample] | None:' - this forces exact parameter name 'state', exact type 'vf.State', and exact formatting, rejecting valid alternatives like using Optional[list[TrainingSample]] or different parameter naming.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests import and call interleave_rollout/branch_rollout via subprocess, inspecting returned values and completion_mask attributes, alongside some text checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests check actual returned None, verify completion_mask values are False, and run upstream tests — a stub returning None for everything would fail the normal-case test.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Empty trajectory handling, error mask zeroing, None check in orchestrator, get_is_truncated removal, and return type signatures are all tested; error metrics logging is partially verified via the truncated output.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and each has descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code behavior, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and names appear consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction describes problem areas at function-level, not line numbers; localization within those functions remains the agent's task.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code task, not an agentmd-edits config task.
